# AningDesign

> AningDesign is the portfolio and service website of Emmanuel Aning, a web designer, software developer, graphic designer, and UI/UX designer based in Accra, Ghana and serving clients worldwide. Its tutorial library supports content from the Aning Design Lab YouTube channel.

## Core expertise

- Web design and responsive website development
- Software development and frontend development
- WordPress, Elementor, React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
- UI/UX design, graphic design, and brand identity
- Technical SEO, website performance, and deployment workflows
- AI-assisted web design and development workflows

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://aningdesign.com/): Portfolio, services, skills, projects, and contact details.
- [Website Designer in Ghana](https://aningdesign.com/web-designer-ghana.html): Website design services for businesses in Ghana.
- [Web Design in Accra](https://aningdesign.com/web-design-accra.html): Web design services for Accra-based businesses.
- [International Web Design Services](https://aningdesign.com/international-web-design-services.html): Website services for international clients.
- [Blog Tutorials](https://aningdesign.com/blog): Practical WordPress, React, SEO, deployment, and AI workflow guides.

## Tutorial library

- [Create a Blog Post in WordPress](https://aningdesign.com/blog/how-to-create-a-blog-post-in-wordpress)
- [Claude Skills for a Real Web Design Workflow](https://aningdesign.com/blog/claude-skills-real-web-design-workflow)
- [Claude AI, Elementor, WordPress, and MCP Workflow](https://aningdesign.com/blog/claude-ai-elementor-wordpress-mcp-workflow)
- [Build and Deploy a React Photography Landing Page](https://aningdesign.com/blog/build-deploy-photography-landing-page-react-netlify)
- [Fix a Bad WordPress Website Design](https://aningdesign.com/blog/fix-bad-website-design-wordpress-elementor)
- [Design a Professional Medical Website](https://aningdesign.com/blog/design-professional-medical-website-wordpress-elementor)
- [Install WordPress Locally with XAMPP](https://aningdesign.com/blog/how-to-install-wordpress-locally-using-xampp)
- [Codex to WordPress Elementor Workflow](https://aningdesign.com/blog/codex-wordpress-elementor-workflow)
- [Connect a Cloudflare Domain to Netlify](https://aningdesign.com/blog/connect-cloudflare-domain-to-netlify)
